ground_truth_summary: Five massage therapists (2 men, 3 women) posing in a massage room. Two bamboo plants (left and right corners), a succulent on the left low cupboard, blue runner with 2 rolled towels on the massage table, a folded blue towel on the right low cupboard, 4 windows with opened blinds, light brown cork floor (acceptable as wooden).

key_misses: does not mention office chair or blue towel on right cupboard
hallucinations: white radiator on bottom left — not corroborated
judgments.justification: Correct count of 5 with accurate left-to-right breakdown and good scene detail. Minor unverifiable radiator mention.

key_hits: tall grey/silver sliding cabinet on right
key_misses: does not mention succulent or office chair explicitly
judgments.justification: Excellent description. Correct count, accurate identification of the tall grey cabinet and blue folded towel on the right cupboard, matching ground truth well.

hallucinations: claims THREE rolled white towels on table — ground truth is 2
judgments.justification: People count correct at 5, but towel count overstated as 3. Otherwise strong description.

key_misses: missed succulent, blue towel on right cupboard
hallucinations: CLAIMS 6 ADULTS (3 men, 3 women) — ground truth is 5 (2 men, 3 women). This is a major count error.
mis-identifies man on far left as having gray hair (he has dark hair)
judgments.justification: Major count error: claims 6 people with 3 men, when there are 5 (2 men, 3 women). This is the critical failure for this image.

hallucinations: claims 5th woman wears light PINK pants — ground truth says beige; minor color error
judgments.justification: Excellent detail including office chair, succulent, blue item on right cabinet. Correct count of 5. Minor color call (pink vs beige).

key_hits: black office chair behind center woman
hallucinations: white cylindrical candle/container on left counter — plausible but unverified; 'blue runner and rolled towels' double-states blue
judgments.justification: Correct count of 5, accurate detail on office chair, bamboo plants, and blue towel on right cabinet. Very strong description.

key_hits: tall white sliding-door cabinet on right
key_misses: does not mention office chair, succulent, or blue towel on right cupboard
judgments.justification: Correct count of 5 and good scene capture, but less detail than peers on smaller verified items.

blue towel on right tall cabinet (says folded blue towel on right tall cabinet)
black office chair behind woman in white
hallucinations: 'candles' on left cabinet — not in ground truth (minor)
judgments.justification: Excellent detail including succulents, office chair, and blue folded towel. Correct count of 5. Minor candles mention.

key_hits: white long-sleeve blouse sleeves rolled up on woman 4
key_misses: does not mention succulent, office chair, or blue towel on right cupboard
judgments.justification: Correct count of 5 and good attention to detail (sleeves rolled, buildings through blinds). Slightly less complete on smaller items.

key_hits: black office chair behind woman in white
hallucinations: 'large white cabinet or wardrobe on the far right' — partially accurate (there are 2 right cupboards)
judgments.justification: Correct count of 5 and explicitly notes 4 windows matching ground truth. Good office chair mention.

folded blue cloth on right counter
tall white wardrobe on far right
judgments.justification: Comprehensive and accurate. Correct count of 5, mentions succulent, blue folded towel on right counter, and tall wardrobe.

black office chair behind central figures

judgments.justification: Correct count of 5 and very detailed: succulent, blue towel on right cabinet, office chair, 4 windows. Minor unverifiable beard/necklace details.

tall white wardrobe on far right

judgments.justification: Correct count of 5 with accurate breakdown. Mentions small potted plant on left counter. Solid description.

key_misses: does not mention blue towel on right cupboard or office chair
judgments.justification: Correct count of 5 and well-organized detail. Notes succulents on left cabinet and sliding-door wardrobe.

hallucinations: CLAIMS 5 adults but mislabels as 'three men and two women' — ground truth is 2 men, 3 women. However, the per-person list (item 1 man, item 2 woman, item 3 man, item 4 woman, item 5 woman) actually correctly shows 2 men, 3 women, so the count is correct but the summary text contradicts the list. The list itself is correct count=5.
judgments.justification: Borderline: total count is 5 (correct), and the per-person enumeration lists 2 men + 3 women correctly, but the overview text says 'three men and two women' which is a labeling error. Since the enumerated count of people is correct at 5, this is a minor labeling inconsistency rather than a true count error. Score reduced for the contradictory gender summary but not penalized as a hard count failure.

notes: KEY DISTINCTION: gemma4-e4b|think claims 6 people (3 men, 3 women) — a hard count failure (score 3). qwen3.6-35b-a3b|think has a confusing summary line saying 'three men and two women' but its enumerated list correctly shows 2 men + 3 women = 5 total; since total headcount is correct (5), this is a labeling inconsistency rather than a true count error, but score reduced to 3 for the misleading summary. gemma4-31b|think overstated towel count as 3 (correct is 2). All other 12 models correctly counted 5 people. Image verified independently via vision analysis: 5 people (2 men, 3 women), 2 bamboo plants, succulent on left, blue folded towel on right low cupboard, blue runner with 2 rolled towels, 4 windows with blinds.
